textByHash.09be60e053f9b18848345c497edd47cc0a050622: Just complete the tasks in Kourend & Kebos area so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHash.0cd280e7e6e2cb8a3902d9aa2acd3f6633f20953: Eventually, with enough exploration, you'll be rewarded.
textByHash.0d394b71fdde172e49a2a21fde5116f2bc4edfb8: free Dynamite per day and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 4 times the normal price down from 6 times. Tyss at the Dark Altar will give you an ash sanctifier too!
textByHash.119251730c2f88167e10b707981b74a3754ec274: that, Konar quo Maten will give you 20 Slayer Points per task rather than 18, you'll be 10% less likely to burn food at the Hosidius City Kitchens, you'll get 10% more Blood runes when Runecrafting, you'll no longer
textByHash.12d558b4d7927864f25d3cff47fef56b4d54c48f: top of that, Konar quo Maten will give you 20 Slayer Points per task rather than 18, you'll be 10% less likely to burn food at the Hosidius City Kitchens, you'll get 10% more Blood runes when Runecrafting, you'll no
textByHash.16d1c01e790870e33188d056873f4f7fb9adaf61: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, you'll get a 6% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and 3 daily teleports to Mount
textByHash.188bbb91461139964e1811401fd53fec4d320a73: If you ever lose your blessing, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHash.2411f6265b6f33347a1b2c05b8ada36141839c81: mine two dense essence blocks at once, Thirus will give you 20 free Dynamite per day and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 6 times the normal price down from 8 times.
textByHash.301595102e8a57e7caa7060e716a115314dc22a3: You need to complete all of the easy tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.
textByHash.37dcf1029d5432973514a563397296d64d1c7ca6: Well, there are four different blessings, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too...
textByHash.4a60a31dcd52dec20cd6fc415b378a68af9781ec: free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 4 times the normal price down from 6 times and Tyss at the Dark Altar will give you an ash sanctifier too.
textByHash.535e642d5f571ced0e0e419156a476df2dad6944: Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you can access Crabclaw Island for half the price, lizardmen are more likely to drop a Xeric's talisman, the people of Hosidius will protect your farming patches for free, you'll be able
textByHash.67cf8ecec3c6856227b0b8c4b1f240d4c962ee92: from 4 times and the experience provided by the ash sanctifier is increased too.
textByHash.694d58a314c505a379648e16acc62d6d1949ba19: I've upgraded your Rada's blessing for you. You now have a 6% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and 3 daily teleports to Mount
textByHash.6d16e07df4ebefaf824f7306ad77f27a0c195a46: need to wear heat protection inside of the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon, Thirus will give you 80 free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 2 times the normal price down
textByHash.6db93de2cadb68c1d84daa42e92a34892d8aa930: If you complete all of the easy tasks, you'll get a 2% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide 3 daily teleports to the Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you'll be able to
textByHash.70b9a5f6dbfbf84895333b615be440f2f13452cc: longer need to wear heat protection inside the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon, Thirus will give you 80 free Dynamite per day, Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 2 times the normal price down
textByHash.752c32fd7e0c958402ca6ffd0e57cce54cd132b1: I'm Elise, the taskmaster for the Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary.
textByHash.76b2e80b00902cca80b947f3cb93aba07f088eab: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Kourend & Kebos area! Here's your reward!
textByHash.8ab277ff5d8deb9af9a52bd7cfccb6f2fa93db75: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you'll get an 8% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and to Mount Karuulm. On top of
textByHash.8c814adcc1552b43f96373fb4b3209344f1a179c: In addition to the easy rewards, you'll get a 4% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It will also provide 5 daily teleports to the Kourend Woodland. On top of that, you'll have a 5% chance to
textByHash.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHash.95d81b52887ddbc363b157d5c36493c549fd73f7: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.
textByHash.9795b65feba7c6afd01f3963e1dd34b867f07e71: This blessing is a symbol of your exploration of Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands. You now have a 2% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides 3 daily teleports to the
textByHash.bb6cc9f8eaf0e4c92735b5bb316d86ce85584575: Not unless you free up some space.
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.ca79d370f77385a0c064b1672fdca3ff3be58dbf: from 4 times and the experience provided by the ash sanctifier is increased too, and finally you'll be more likely to gain higher tiered ores from Blast Mining.
textByHash.cb804a5e1625fca023ea3eaa24c1020cf157343c: I've upgraded your Rada's blessing for you. You now have an 8% chance of catching two fish at once while using the blessing. It also provides unlimited teleports to the Kourend Woodland and to Mount Karuulm. On
textByHash.d0c6f643bec7bdd5473a75b9250e912b286413cd: in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 8 times the normal price down from 10 times.

textByHash.e78082fb4b92f2010c69810f32b6da295abf9a5d: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In Great Kourend and the Kebos Lowlands, it can help you discover some quite useful things.
textByHash.f4eefe3c57b2e5acb7a4aabf242de0d68f20b019: to use the Hosidius Kitchens and Eodan in the Forthos Dungeon will now tan hide for you at 8 times the normal price down from 10 times.
textByHash.f706fa6d607420b4d90406cb86b87528a39a748b: which tier of rewards would you like to know more about?
